news.title: Nvidia Shines While SOX Falls
news.description: The PHLX Semiconductor Index is down 4.3% with all components in the red–with one big exception.  Nvidia is up roughly 1%.  The index gained more than 87% in that timeframe, compared with Nvidia’s nearly 15% gain, according to Dow Jones Market Data.
